home_lede: The Collective is a Minecraft event server built for players who want something worth actually showing up for.
home_more_p1: We run large scale civilisation events, smaller mini events, and tournaments throughout the year, all built with real investment, custom development, and a standard that most servers in this space simply do not meet. No rushed launches, no half finished ideas, no events that disappear after two weeks.
home_more_p2: The goal is simple. Build the kind of server that people remember being part of.
events_sub: Click an event to see the full details.
events_empty: No events scheduled yet — check back soon.
apps_sub: Open applications can be filled in now. Locked ones show a countdown.
apps_login_prompt: Log in with Discord to apply for events.
apps_empty: No applications open right now — check back soon!
apps_vip_early_desc: You have early access — apply before it opens to everyone.
apps_apply_now: Applications are open — click to apply.
apply_alert_playstyle: Please select a playstyle to continue.
apply_alert_written_wc_pre: Your written application needs at least 150 words. You have
apply_no_event_p: There are no events open for applications right now. Check back soon.
apply_accepted_p2: . Watch your Discord for further instructions.
apply_declined_p1: Your application was not successful at Stage
apply_declined_p2: . You cannot reapply for this event with this Discord account.
apply_declined_p3: Your application was not successful this time. We appreciate you applying and hope to see you at a future event.
apply_pending_p2: is being reviewed by staff. Track your progress below.
apply_received_p2: has been submitted. We'll review it and reach out via Discord.
apply_not_open_p2: aren't open yet. Come back at:
apply_login_p: You need to sign in with Discord before you can submit your application.
apply_error_incomplete: Your application was missing some required information — please fill in all fields and try again.
apply_error_server: Something went wrong saving your application — please try submitting again. Your answers are still saved.
apply_resume_banner: Resuming your draft — picked up from stage
apply_s1_sub: Confirm you meet the basic requirements. Takes about 30 seconds.
apply_disq_body: Unfortunately you don't qualify for this event based on your answers. We hope to see you at a future one.
apply_s2_sub: Read the overview and rules below, confirm you've read them, then answer 3 quick questions to continue.
apply_i_read: I have read and understood the event overview above.
apply_quiz_intro: Answer all 3 correctly to continue. Wrong answers reset with a different question — refer to the rules on the left at any time.
apply_s3_how_heard: How did you hear about The Collective?
apply_s3_session_hint: All 10 sessions are shown below with times in your local timezone. Tick every session you can attend. You must be able to make at least 5 sessions including Session 1 to be considered.
apply_s3_played_civ: Have you played civilisation-style events before?
apply_s3_creates_content: Do you create content? (YouTube, Twitch, etc.)
apply_s3_island_hint: Click the islands in order from most to least preferred. Click again to remove a selection.
apply_s3_friends_label: Friends you want to play with
apply_s3_friends_hint: Optional. List the Minecraft IGNs of anyone you'd like to be placed with, one per line. Important: they must also include your IGN in their application — both sides need to list each other for us to try and group you together.
apply_s3_friends_ph: Enter IGNs here, one per line...
apply_s4_desc_ph: Be specific. What would you actually do on Day 1?
apply_s6_video_desc: Record a short 1–3 minute introduction and paste the link.
apply_s6_written_desc: Write at least 150 words about yourself.
apply_s7_sub: Read and confirm each item to submit your application.
apply_s7_confirm: I confirm that all information I have provided in this application is truthful, accurate, and my own. I understand that submitting false or misleading information may result in my removal from the event.
store_sub: Two ranks. One-time purchase. Cosmetics that carry across all CUE events and the community server.
store_success: Purchase complete! Your rank will be applied within a few minutes.

quiz.q: From which session is PvP permanently enabled?
What happens if you disconnect to avoid death?
Is stealing from other players and their bases allowed?
Is destroying another player's builds purely to grief allowed?
Where should you report a rule break during a live session?
opts: By messaging a staff member directly
Performance mods like Sodium and Optifine

quiz.q: Is impersonating staff a bannable offence?
Can you share information about the event publicly before it begins?
Is killing a player on your own island allowed from session 2?
opts: No, only players from other islands
Yes, anyone can be killed from session 2

quiz.q: Can you advertise other servers or Discord servers during the event?
Is sharing another player's real life personal information allowed?
opts: Only if relevant to a dispute

quiz.q: What happens if you abuse the ticket system with false reports?
Is intentionally destroying your own island's altar allowed?
